# Mezzofy Website - Robots.txt

User-agent: *
Allow: /

# Block test pages
Disallow: /test-i18n.html
Disallow: /test-translation-debug.html
Disallow: /translation-test-results.html

# Block admin/internal paths (if any added in future)
Disallow: /admin/
Disallow: /internal/

# Crawl rate (optional - uncomment if needed)
# Crawl-delay: 1

# Sitemap location
Sitemap: https://mezzofy.com/sitemap.xml

# Common bots
User-agent: Googlebot
Allow: /

User-agent: Bingbot
Allow: /

User-agent: Slurp
Allow: /

# AI crawlers — explicitly allowed for AEO
User-agent: GPTBot
Allow: /

Allow: /

Allow: /

Allow: /

Allow: /

Allow: /

Allow: /

Allow: /

# Block bad bots (optional)
